description: デプロイ前の確認手順（テスト→ステージング→本番の順序）

entries.content: Ran unit tests and all 342 tests passed. Ready for staging deployment.
Deployed to staging environment. Smoke tests passed. Load test shows p95 latency 120ms.
Deployed to production. Monitoring shows no errors. Deployment complete.

query: What was the first step before deploying to production?

description: マイグレーション後の検証手順

entries.content: Started database migration from MySQL to PostgreSQL. Backed up all data before migration.
Migration completed. Running data integrity checks. Row counts match between MySQL and PostgreSQL.
Integration tests passed on PostgreSQL. Switched application connection string. Old MySQL instance kept for 30 days as fallback.

query: What happened right after the migration completed?

description: バグ発見→調査→修正→検証の時系列

entries.content: User reported memory leak in the session manager. Sessions not being garbage collected after timeout.
Investigated session manager. Found circular reference in event listeners preventing GC. Root cause identified.
Fixed circular reference by using WeakRef for event listener callbacks. Memory usage stabilized.
Verified fix in staging for 24 hours. Memory usage steady at baseline. Fix confirmed and deployed to production.

query: What was the root cause of the memory leak and when was it identified?

description: スプリント内のタスク進行順序

entries.content: Sprint 12 kickoff. Team committed to 3 features: user dashboard, export to CSV, and email notifications.
User dashboard completed and merged. Started work on CSV export feature.
CSV export done. Email notification feature deprioritized, moved to next sprint due to third-party API issues.
Sprint 12 retrospective. 2 of 3 features shipped. Email notifications deferred to Sprint 13.

query: Which feature was completed first in Sprint 12?

description: リリースサイクル（計画→開発→テスト→リリース）

entries.content: v2.0 release planning meeting. Scope: new search API, bulk import, and performance improvements. Target: end of Q1.
Development phase complete. All v2.0 features implemented. Entering QA phase.
QA completed. 12 bugs fixed. Performance benchmarks show 40% improvement. Ready for release.
v2.0 released to production. Release notes published. All systems green.

query: When was v2.0 released and what happened just before the release?

description: インシデント対応の時系列（検知→一次対応→根本対応）

entries.content: Alert fired: API response time p99 > 5 seconds. Error rate increased to 8%. Incident declared at 02:14 UTC.
Immediate mitigation: rolled back last deployment. Error rate back to normal. Incident downgraded.
Root cause analysis: N+1 query introduced in last deployment caused DB overload. Fixed with eager loading.
Fixed version deployed to production. DB query count reduced by 90%. Postmortem published.

query: What was the first action taken when the incident was detected?

description: 設計レビュー→実装→コードレビューの順序

entries.content: Design review for new caching layer approved. Decision: use Redis with 15-minute TTL for user session data.
Implementation complete. Redis caching layer integrated. Unit tests written for cache hit/miss scenarios.
Code review completed. 3 minor changes requested: error handling, logging, and cache invalidation logic.
Changes addressed and PR approved. Merged to main. Cache hit rate in staging: 78%.

query: What decision was made in the design review and when did implementation start?

description: 環境構築の手順（DB→API→フロント）

entries.content: Set up PostgreSQL database on new server. Created schema, ran migrations, seeded test data.
Configured API server. Connected to database. Health check endpoint responding. API running on port 4000.
Frontend deployed. Connected to API. End-to-end smoke test passed. Environment ready for QA.

query: What was set up first when building the environment?

description: 認証フロー変更の前後関係

entries.content: Decision to replace OAuth 2.0 with SAML for enterprise SSO support. Affects login flow and token handling.
SAML integration with Okta completed. Legacy OAuth flow still running in parallel for migration period.
All enterprise customers migrated to SAML. OAuth flow disabled. Login exclusively through SAML SSO.

query: When was OAuth completely disabled and replaced by SAML?

description: パフォーマンス改善の段階的実施

entries.content: Performance profiling completed. Identified 3 bottlenecks: slow DB queries, missing indexes, and unoptimized image serving.
Added database indexes on user_id and created_at columns. Query time for dashboard reduced from 800ms to 120ms.
Implemented CDN for image serving. Image load time reduced by 65%. Overall page load improved.
Optimized N+1 queries with eager loading. API response time p95 improved from 2.1s to 340ms. All 3 bottlenecks resolved.

query: What was the first performance improvement implemented after profiling?
